# Feature: Title

Status: Proposed | Active | Deferred | Superseded
Date: YYYY-MM-DD

## Purpose

What product capability is this feature meant to provide?

## User Value

What question does this help the user answer or what workflow does it support?

## Data Classification

Is this evidence, metadata, derived intelligence, assessment, or presentation?

## Creation Path

How does this feature create or update records?

## Must Not Do

What would violate project tenets or evidence boundaries?

## Suggested Data Shape

Fields or structures under consideration.

## Related Documents

- Link relevant tenets, schemas, ADRs, statements, or roadmap notes.
